sections.title: A and An
sections.content:
We use **a** or **an** with one thing. **A** before a consonant sound, **an** before a vowel sound.

• **a** book, **a** car, **a** dog
• **an** apple, **an** egg, **an** hour

sections.title: The
sections.content:
We use **the** when we know which one we mean:

• I bought a car. **The** car is red.
• **The** sun is bright.
• Close **the** door.

sections.title: No article
sections.content:
Sometimes we use no article:

• **Cats** are animals. (general)
• I like **coffee**. (general)
• We had **breakfast** at eight. (meals)

questions.question: I need _____ umbrella.
questions.explanation: Umbrella starts with a vowel sound. We use an.

questions.question: _____ sun is very bright today.
questions.explanation: There is only one sun. We use the.

questions.question: She is _____ engineer.
questions.explanation: Engineer starts with a vowel sound. We use an.

questions.question: I bought _____ car. _____ car is red.
questions.explanation: First: a car. Second: we know which car, so the.

questions.question: He goes to _____ work by bus.
